PROGRESS NOTE

Unit No. 25/39

PACKED RED BLOOD CELLS
Prepared from 350498ml whole blood in 45ml CPD-A Solution
V.D.R.L Negative
Anti-HIV 1&2 Negative
Malaria Antibody Not Detected ABO Rh (D) NEGATIVE
25/7/24 Date of Exp. G/S/24
Instruction (1) Store between 2 to 6°C (2) Cross Match
Thoroughly before use (3) Administer through sterile:
